final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing panoramic gongbi heavy-color scroll painting of the Tang Dynasty Chang'an Lantern Festival.

Style/medium: gongbi heavy-color scroll painting (工笔重彩长卷)
Composition: panoramic long scroll format, wide horizontal view capturing the full expanse of Chang'an city
Subject: Tang Dynasty Chang'an city during Lantern Festival, thousands of lanterns illuminating the night
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chang'an cityscape with streets, architecture, crowds celebrating, countless lanterns hanging and glowing
Lighting/mood: night scene with warm lantern light spreading across the city, festive and majestic atmosphere
Color palette: rich traditional Chinese pigments, warm golden lantern glow against deep night blues and reds
Materials/textures: silk scroll texture, fine gongbi brushwork with layered mineral pigments
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must maintain Tang Dynasty architectural accuracy, long scroll format
Avoid: modern elements, anachronistic details, Western perspective distortion
